title: Rahu Mantra
intro: Rahu Mantra with meaning. Chant this supreme mantra to receive the grace of Lord Rahu.
description:
Main Mantra

Om Bhram Bhreem Bhraum Sah Rahave Namah.

English Meaning

Om,
I bow to Lord Rahu,
whose radiance is
smoky and shadow-like.

faq.q1: When should Rahu Mantra be chanted?
faq.a1: Rahu Mantra may be chanted in the morning or as advised according to traditional astrological practices.
faq.q2: How many times should Rahu Mantra be chanted?
faq.a2: It is commonly chanted 11, 21, 51, or 108 times.
faq.q3: What are the benefits of chanting Rahu Mantra?
faq.a3: According to Hindu tradition, chanting Rahu Mantra is believed to promote mental peace, positive energy, and the blessings of Rahu.
faq.q4: Can Rahu Mantra be chanted daily?
faq.a4: Yes, Rahu Mantra may be chanted daily with devotion.
faq.a5: Yes, anyone can chant Rahu Mantra with faith and devotion.
